overall.description: A cinematic walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit alleys, commercial streets, and dense urban architecture. The footage appears to be from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), following a character through narrow passages and main streets with vibrant holographic advertisements and scattered pedestrians.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow enclosed alleyway at night, illuminated by artificial green neon lights from a doorway on the left. The camera moves forward past trash bags and advertising screens mounted on the right wall, with concrete ground and building walls creating a tight corridor.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a slightly wider alley featuring a prominent blue neon hotel sign ahead. The camera passes a food stall on the right where a vendor stands, and two NPCs conversing near a graffiti-covered wall on the left. The ground remains concrete with scattered debris.

An overpass structure spans the street ahead. The camera follows a pedestrian in a yellow jacket while passing a street vendor cart on the left.

A yellow taxi drives past on the street, and various neon signs including a prominent Kiroshi corporate sign illuminate the scene.

A food stall with bright lighting is visible ahead where a vendor works at the counter. The environment returns to an enclosed, sheltered space with concrete ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that travels from a claustrophobic neon alleyway into a bustling commercial district before retreating back into a sheltered side street. It begins in a tight, concrete corridor illuminated by green neon and advertising screens, moving forward past trash bags and debris. As the space widens slightly, the camera passes a blue hotel sign and a food stall where NPCs converse against graffiti-covered walls, before finally exiting the alley into a broad commercial street dominated by the orange signage of the Fuyutsuki building and a spanning overpass. The scene then expands into a vibrant urban hub filled with holographic billboards, passing pedestrians and a yellow taxi under the glow of a Kiroshi corporate sign. Finally, the camera turns away from the main thoroughfare and slips back into a narrow alleyway characterized by red graffiti and hanging paper lanterns that lead toward a brightly lit food stall.
